# Etra: Names & Cultures — torrent culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === TORRENT CULTURES ===

REPLACE:heuhian_culture = {
	language = heuhian_dialect
	color = torrent_heuhian
	tags = { south_german_gfx german_gfx western_european_gfx european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		torrenter_group
		human_group
		vetusian_group
	}
}
